summary: Frontend-only testing of 3 new TransformationSection fixes: header visibility, final all-4 redesign, staggered heights. All pass on 1280x800 viewport.

test_results.header_visibility_top78px: PASS - Header div has top:78px (was 28px), all 3 text elements visible: overline 'THE TRANSFORMATION', h2 'What Becomes Possible', subtitle. Screenshot confirms fully visible below nav bar.
test_results.final_row_120px_circles: PASS - All 4 small circles are exactly 120x120px. Each circle contains only the serial number (01-04) in Cormorant Garamond.
test_results.final_row_text_outside_circles: PASS - Heading text (e.g. 'From Reactive\nto Responsive') is a sibling element BELOW the circle div, not inside it.
test_results.final_row_stagger: PASS - marginTop values confirmed: item1=0px, item2=72px, item3=26px, item4=98px (matches FINAL_STAGGER=[0,72,26,98]).
test_results.final_row_top160px: PASS - Final row container top:160px, clears nav + full header block.
test_results.final_row_4_columns: PASS - 4 items in final row, flex:1 maxWidth:230px each.
test_results.individual_circles_lr_alternating: PASS - C1:left:22%, C2:left:78%, C3:left:22%, C4:left:78% (L/R/L/R pattern preserved).
test_results.no_ghost_dots: PASS - Individual circles 2-4 opacity:0 at section entry (confirmed by previous iteration tests, transforms unchanged).

context_for_next_testing_agent: TransformationSection: section at ~3862px, 500vh=4000px. Preloader 4s. Header top:78px. Final row: 4x120px circles, text below, stagger [0,72,26,98]px. All 3 fixes from this iteration verified pass. Viewport: 1280x800.
